markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after a winner is declared.
markets.rules_primary: If Chicago C and Baltimore tie in the first 7 innings of the Chicago C vs Baltimore professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jul 7, 2026 at 6:35 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: This market refers to the first 7 innings of the Chicago C vs Baltimore professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jul 7, 2026 at 6:35 PM EDT. If the score at the end of the first 7 innings is tied, the "Tie" strike will resolve to Yes and all team strikes will resolve to No. If this game is postponed or delayed, the market will remain open and close after the rescheduled game has finished (within two days).
